## Tool: read
Read one file per line. You may include multiple ranges for that file.
Syntax:

read sample.txt H10
read sample.txt T20
read sample.txt H10
read sample.txt T50
read src/sample2.txt
Notes:
- One file per read line.
- Multiple ranges are allowed for the same file.
- `H10` reads the first 10 lines. `T20` reads the last 20 lines. (heads and tails)
- Prefer explicit relative paths when known. Basename-only reads are a fallback, not the preferred style.
- recursive file reads are also supported. Which means if a file is in a deep nested folder like-
- path/path/path/path/sample69.txt - if you called read sample69.txt, it would still get read.

468тЖТ@app.get("/reports/monthly/pdf")
469тЖТasync def get_monthly_report_pdf(db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
470тЖТ    """Monthly report: per operator, per day meters."""
471тЖТ    now = datetime.utcnow()
472тЖТ    start_of_month = datetime(now.year, now.month, 1)
473тЖТ    logs = db.query(models.ProductionLog).filter(models.ProductionLog.date >= start_of_month).all()
474тЖТ    
475тЖТ    # Group by operator
476тЖТ    op_data = {}
477тЖТ    for l in logs:
478тЖТ        name = l.operator_name or "Unknown"
479тЖТ        if name not in op_data:
480тЖТ            op_data[name] = {"machine": l.machine_id, "days": {}, "total": 0.0}
481тЖТ        day_str = l.date.strftime("%d-%m")
482тЖТ        op_data[name]["days"][day_str] = op_data[name]["days"].get(day_str, 0) + l.meters_woven
483тЖТ        op_data[name]["total"] += l.meters_woven
484тЖТ    
485тЖТ    rows = []
486тЖТ    for name, info in op_data.items():
487тЖТ        rows.append([name, info["machine"], ""])
488тЖТ        for day, meters in sorted(info["days"].items()):
489тЖТ            rows.append(["", f"  {day}", f"{meters:.0f} m"])
490тЖТ        rows.append(["", "JAMI", f"{info['total']:.0f} m"])
491тЖТ    
492тЖТ    if not rows:
493тЖТ        rows = [["Ma'lumot yo'q", "", ""]]
494тЖТ    
495тЖТ    file_obj = reports.generate_pdf_report("OYLIK OPERATOR HISOBOTI", ["Operator", "Kun/Stankok", "Metr"], rows)
496тЖТ    return StreamingResponse(file_obj, media_type="application/pdf", headers={"Content-Disposition": "attachment; filename=monthly_report.pdf"})
